main.head: alone
main.top-text: This is the one trading secret other brokers will never tell you.
main.title: Successful traders never count on their withdrawal amount when trading
main.main-text:
Once you make profit it’s highly advisable to withdraw at least a portion of it. Why? The elation from your win can cause you to make emotional and irresponsible trading decisions. You wouldn’t want to get too excited and lose your profit, would you?

You can always replenish your account later on if you need to. However, once you’ve made a withdrawal request don’t count on that amount in your trading. It will be deduced from your balance in 24 hours, but in the meantime, try to restrain yourself and you’ll be pleased in the long run.
main.cta-text: Keep checking your mailbox for more pro trading tips from IQ Option to get your trading on the next level!
